title: Fathom vs Matomo
description: Compare Fathom vs Matomo in July 20. We analyzed features, pricing, user ratings, and real-world performance to help you choose the right analytics & data tool.
verdict: After thorough evaluation, Fathom emerges as our recommendation for most users with a 4.5/5 rating compared to 4.3/5. However, the best choice depends on your specific needs. We recommend evaluating both tools against your requirements.

faqs.question: Which is better, Fathom or Matomo?
faqs.answer: Based on our detailed comparison, Fathom edges ahead with a 4.5/5 rating. Fathom excels at Simple, privacy-focused website analytics platform., while Matomo is stronger for Matomo is a analytics & data platform that helps Privacy Teams and Marketers and.

faqs.question: What are the main differences between Fathom and Matomo?
faqs.answer: Fathom and Matomo differ in pricing ($14-54/mo vs Free (self-hosted) – $26/mo), target audience, and feature focus. Our comparison table breaks down these differences.

faqs.question: Is Fathom cheaper than Matomo?
faqs.answer: Fathom starts at $14-54/mo while Matomo starts at Free (self-hosted) – $26/mo. Consider total cost of ownership including implementation and training.

faqs.question: Which tool has better features, Fathom or Matomo?
faqs.answer: Both platforms offer strong features for analytics & data. Fathom scores higher overall, but specific feature needs may favor one over the other.

faqs.question: Can I use Fathom and Matomo together?
faqs.answer: Many organizations use both tools for complementary purposes. However, for overlapping use cases, choosing one streamlines workflows.

faqs.question: Which is easier to use, Fathom or Matomo?
faqs.answer: Both Fathom and Matomo prioritize user experience. The best choice depends on your team's technical expertise and workflow preferences.

faqs.question: Which platform has better customer support?
faqs.answer: Both offer documentation and support tiers. The quality varies by plan level — check our detailed review for support comparisons.

faqs.question: Which analytics & data tool is best for my team size?
faqs.answer: Enterprise features favor Matomo for large teams, while Fathom may be more suitable for smaller teams with its $14-54/mo pricing.
